input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.3.1
            TITLE: maintenance plugs must allow electrical separation of the accumulator segments to meet:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.3.1: Maintenance Plugs must allow electrical separation of the Accumulator Segments to meet:
EV.5.3.1 Maintenance Plugs must allow electrical separation of the Accumulator Segments to meet:  
a. The separated Segments meet voltage and energy limits of EV.5.1.2 
b. The separation must affect both poles of the Segment

final_answer: Maintenance Plugs must allow electrical separation of the Accumulator Segments to meet: a. The separated Segments meet voltage and energy limits of EV.5.1.2 b. The separation must affect both poles of the Segment
